prompt: This is an XOR gate — a tricky one! What do you think happens when you turn A on?
XOR gate — let's find out what it does. Turn switch A on!
feedback: Fan spins! XOR works with just one. Now turn B on too — what do you think happens?
It works! Now try turning B on as well — I wonder what XOR does then?

prompt: Try switch B — both on now!
feedback: Fan stops! Both on and it stops — XOR only works when the switches are different. Turn B off.
Both on and it stopped! XOR doesn't like it when they match. Turn B off.
Fan spins again! XOR needs the switches to be different — one on, one off. Same means stop!
Back on! Different switches — fan spins. Same switches — fan stops. That's XOR!
